title: catalog: onlytools.manifest.json declares catalog.tier 'T0' but owner tiering classifies sentinel as T1 — tier dri…
description:
[P1 · catalog · audit] onlytools.manifest.json declares catalog.tier 'T0' but owner tiering classifies sentinel as T1 — tier drift. Also leaks maintainer personal name: owner='luke' and releaseOwner='luke'.

Evidence: onlytools.manifest.json: catalog.tier='T0', classification='core-tool', owner='luke', releaseOwner='luke'. Task context states sentinel=T1.

Fix: Set catalog.tier to 'T1' and classification accordingly; replace owner/releaseOwner 'luke' with a non-personal handle/team identifier.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
